INVOKE.COMMENT: --- Get challange codes list from BRE ---

BRANCH.COMMENT: --- Check if challenge_codes retured from BRE ---

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- Challenge Codes are returned from BRE ---

BRANCH.COMMENT: --- Check AutoOptIn status for the challengeCode ---

Values.value: --IsAutoOptIn is TRUE-process start for challenge Cancel---
INPROGRESS periods updated to NOTACHIEVED for challenge Code :%challengeCodes% and challengePeriodId: %challengePeriods/challengePeriodId%
